title: Rappenem's Reforge - AppleSkin Addon
description: Addon to adjust AppleSkin's texture for Rappenem's Reforge pack.
body:
Simple addon for the Rappenem's Reforge resource pack that adds appropriate shape to AppleSkin's overlay.

This addon is based on Rappenem's Reforge v1.1.

Here is the [Rappenem's Reforge pack](https://modrinth.com/project/bpCFbDTV)
